subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested Himself in His beauty, revealed Himself in the grandeur of His majesty, shone forth with the light of His countenance, and radiated with His splendour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بجماله و ظهر بعظمه جلاله و اشرق بنور وجهه و لاح بضیاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement
